n✝ : ℕ
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝² : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
hμ_moments : ∀ (k : ℕ), Integrable (fun x => x ^ k) μ
hν_moments : ∀ (k : ℕ), Integrable (fun x => x ^ k) ν
hμ_mean : integral μ id = 0
hν_mean : integral ν id = 0
hμ_var : ∫ (x : ℝ), x ^ 2 ∂μ = 1
Ω : Type u_1
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : Ω → Matrix (Fin n✝) (Fin n✝) ℝ
n : ℕ
⊢ IsProbabilityMeasure (Measure.pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n))
